question: 1X NEO humanoid robot ships to first consumer homes by June 30, 2026
textDescription:
1X Technologies' NEO humanoid robot is the first consumer-ready home robot to open preorders with a clear price ($20,000 for Early Access) and 2026 delivery window. This market tracks whether NEO successfully delivers to consumer homes by mid-2026 as promised.

Resolution Criteria: Market resolves YES if credible reports confirm that 1X has shipped at least one NEO unit to a consumer home address by June 30, 2026. Resolution sources: 1X official announcements, shipping confirmations, or major tech news outlets (TechCrunch, The Verge, The Robot Report).

Sources:

1X NEO preorder announcement: https://www.therobotreport.com/1x-announces-pre-order-launch-neo-humanoid-robot/

1X official website for delivery updates
newsShortReason: 1X Technologies has commenced full-scale production of NEO robots, with consumer shipments scheduled for 2026.
newsKeyEvidence: 1X opened a 58,000-square-foot factory in Hayward, California, aiming to produce 10,000 NEO robots in 2026. | The company has already produced 17,000 motors since opening the factory. | 1X plans to deliver the first NEOs to private customers by the end of 2026. | NEO is available for pre-order, with first orders shipping to consumer homes in 2026. | 1X has sold out its entire first-year production capacity of over 10,000 units within five days of opening pre-orders.
